evidence: "This is one of my favorite musicals. Love the score."
"Weird as only Stephen King can do weird."
"The storylines are still interesting and the interaction between Beckett, Castle, and the rest of the cast is still fun to watch."
"The music and costumes are great in this DVD. It's a wonderful show in spots, and not-so-great in others."
"I thought Episode I was very entertaining and fun to watch."
"The music was wonderful for that part, but the choreography was just boring and didn't add to the story, in my opinion."
"Wow...the music, the sets, the acting...I loved this DVD!"
"The dancing is terrific in this show, as usual."
"I was pleasantly surprised at Catherine Zeta-Jones and Rene Zellweger's singing and dancing ability, that much I will admit."
"The music, the sets, the acting...I loved this DVD!"
"Great story, great characters, great music! This is one of those films you'll watch over and over again."
"Love the characters and the writing, though the storylines in season 4 are not quite as engaging."

summary: The user enjoys a variety of genres, particularly musicals and dramas, and appreciates high production quality. They prefer fast-paced narratives with engaging characters, though they have mixed feelings about narrative complexity and brand loyalty.
